NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100020807)
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MEDLIANT, A NEVADA CORPORATION AS TO RESPONDENT SURPRISE VALLEY HEALTH CARE DISTRICT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MEDLIANT'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR MEDLIANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE PETITION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH CONFORMS TO THE RELIEF STATED IN THE AWARD AND MUST BRING THEM TO THE HEARING OR EMAIL THEM TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG PRIOR TO THE HEARING EVEN IF THE TENTATIVE RULING IS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONER TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER MEDLIANT, A NEVADA CORPORATION

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
J. Timothy Nardell, Esq. (415-306-5560) for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The mater is discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MEDLIANT'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel for Medliant is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the petition was not opposed and a proposed judgment which conforms to the relief stated in the award and must bring them to the hearing or email them to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing even if the tentative ruling is not contested. Petitioner to prepare proposed order and proposed judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
